audience: Hospital executives and senior leadership team
narrative_arc: Title — AI in Healthcare 2026 funding ask
Context — adoption pressure on regional hospital networks
Key insight — single hero stat anchoring the case for investment
Evidence — comparison of pilot vs. control cohorts
Implications — what the data means for the next planning cycle
Closing — decision needed and call to action

key_claims.claim: AI triage cut median ED wait time by 38%
Pilot cohort outperformed control on 4 of 5 KPIs
